title: what are the mechanics of the cloud and the glory? how do they relate to each other? does the cloud surround the glory? when the cloud surrounds the tabernacle, does the glory go into the tabernacle?
author: joshualinog
excerpt: Exodus 40:34-35 LEB 34 And the cloud covered the tent of assembly, and the glory of Yahweh filled the tabernacle. 35 And Moses was unable to go into the tent of assembly because the cloud settled on i
body:
Exodus 40:34-35 LEB 34 And the cloud covered the tent of assembly, and the glory of Yahweh filled the tabernacle. 35 And Moses was unable to go into the tent of assembly because the cloud settled on it and the glory of Yahweh filled the tabernacle.Exodus 40:34-35 HB2 34 40:34 וַיְכַס הֶעָנָן אֶת־אֹהֶל מוֹעֵד וּכְבוֹד יְהוָה מָלֵא אֶת־הַמִּשְׁכָּן: 35 40:35 וְלֹא־יָכֹל מֹשֶׁה לָבוֹא אֶל־אֹהֶל מוֹעֵד כִּי־שָׁכַן עָלָיו הֶעָנָן וּכְבוֹד יְהוָה מָלֵא אֶת־הַמִּשְׁכָּן:

is the tent the naked flesh, And The Glory the soul? is that why you can't look at the vessels? because the vessels and Furniture themselves are the naked flesh? 
- maybe this is true in degrees, but what about the fact that the priests are allowed to look? aren't nadav and Avi hu priests? so what they're trying to look at seems to be the glory.
content:
Exodus 40:34-35 LEB 34 And the cloud covered the tent of assembly, and the glory of Yahweh filled the tabernacle. 35 And Moses was unable to go into the tent of assembly because the cloud settled on it and the glory of Yahweh filled the tabernacle.Exodus 40:34-35 HB2 34 40:34 וַיְכַס הֶעָנָן אֶת־אֹהֶל מוֹעֵד וּכְבוֹד יְהוָה מָלֵא אֶת־הַמִּשְׁכָּן: 35 40:35 וְלֹא־יָכֹל מֹשֶׁה לָבוֹא אֶל־אֹהֶל מוֹעֵד כִּי־שָׁכַן עָלָיו הֶעָנָן וּכְבוֹד יְהוָה מָלֵא אֶת־הַמִּשְׁכָּן:

is the tent the naked flesh, And The Glory the soul? is that why you can't look at the vessels? because the vessels and Furniture themselves are the naked flesh? 
- maybe this is true in degrees, but what about the fact that the priests are allowed to look? aren't nadav and Avi hu priests? so what they're trying to look at seems to be the glory.
